business.name: Satori Tattoo
business.description: Award-winning tattoo & piercing studio in downtown Loveland, CO. Over 100 years of combined experience, 14 artists, all styles. Walk-ins always welcome — or book a consultation. Open daily 12–8 (Fri & Sat until 10).
business.founderStory: Chris has been tattooing for 25 years. He moved to Colorado in 2018 and opened a shop on 4th Street within months. His wife Kim joined him, and they expanded to a larger location just across the street. Satori Tattoo has been a cornerstone of downtown Loveland for over 6 years.

artists.name: George
artists.specialty: American Traditional — Bold to the Bone

reviews.author: BestProsInTown
reviews.text: Satori Tattoo is a professional establishment with a team that impresses with their efficiency and friendliness. The artists are skilled and meticulous. They are patient, careful, and make the experience as enjoyable as possible. A 10/10 experience.

reviews.author: Yahoo Local
reviews.text: Satori is just an incredible studio all around. The whole team is welcoming, professional, and genuinely passionate about what they do. You feel it the second you walk in — it's clean, calm, and amazing.

reviews.author: Yahoo Local
reviews.text: Phenomenal shop. Great owner and crew. Awesome place to spend some time and get inked. I now wait until I visit Colorado for any new work.

reviews.author: Nextdoor
reviews.text: Check out Satori Tattoo on 4th St. All the artists are amazing.

faq.q: How much will my tattoo cost?
faq.a: The cost depends on size, design complexity, and time. We offer Basic, Premium, and Exclusive packages. During your consultation, we'll give you an estimate based on your design.

faq.q: How long will my tattoo take?
faq.a: Smaller tattoos may take 1–2 hours, while larger pieces can take several hours or multiple sessions. We'll discuss the expected time frame during your consultation.
Absolutely! After your session, we walk you through proper aftercare including cleaning, sun protection, and moisturizing.
